user_feedback: when the game is paused, I dont want to see paused press ESC to resume, and I don't want the game to be grayed out, but I also don't want the HUD to be hidden,
analysis:
- Issue identified: When the game is paused, the HUD is hidden due to a conditional check in renderUI that only displays the HUD when gamePhase is PLAYING. The user wants the HUD to remain visible during pause, with no pause overlay text and no visual graying.
- Files affected: ui.js
- Changes needed: Modify the conditional in renderUI to also render the HUD when gamePhase is PAUSED, ensuring all game stats remain visible during pause without any overlay or dimming effect.
